title: ageratina tejalapana
intro: Ageratina tejalapana, also known as Tejocote, is a type of shrub native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Ageratina tejalapana include its ability to reduce menstrual cramps, improve digestion, and lower cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Tejocote can be found in capsule or tea form, and it is often consumed in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
